'''Dalastine IV''', also known simply as '''Dalastine''', was a gloomy [[Planetoid/Legends|planetoid]]<ref name="AD" /> located in the [[Dalastine system/Legends|Dalastine system]] of the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]].<ref name="TEA" /> The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] maintained a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Dalastine Rebel base|base]] on Dalastine IV which operated [[GAT-12 Skipray Blastboat|Skipray blastboats]].<ref name="AD" />

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|book=Galaxy Guide 9: Fragments from the Rim|story=Arkanian Dawn (narrative)}} {{1st}}
